channel.title: Home on anthonytobi.dev | Lawyer & Developer
channel.description: Recent content in Home on anthonytobi.dev | Lawyer & Developer

item.title: JavaScript Haunts Me Till This Day
item.description: A story about passing on JavaScript years ago, choosing football and law instead, and why I now think more lawyers should learn a little code.

item.title: Tenanto
item.description: A robust tenant management software engineered specifically for the Nigerian real estate market.

item.title: AI Agent for Debugging Code
item.description: An intelligent agent built with Python and the Google GenAI SDK to assist in code debugging.

item.title: Freelance Contract Prompt Pack
item.description: Draft clearer client agreements faster without starting from scratch every time.

item.title: Legal PDF Analysis Tool
item.description: A local tool for organizing incoming legal PDFs, generating clean document indexes, and preparing files for review.

item.title: Why I became a Software Developer after Law School
item.description: The intersection of law and technology is where the future of compliance and business operates. Here is my journey from Nigeria to Lithuania, bridging both worlds.

item.title: HashClerk Backend
item.description: A document integrity backend system built entirely in Go.

item.title: About Me
item.description:
I am Anthony Orobosan Tobi, a Software Developer and Legal Technology professional from Nigeria, currently based in Vilnius, Lithuania.

My journey is unconventional. I spent over a decade as a Legal Officer and Company Secretary in Nigeria, managing board governance and drafting commercial contracts. However, I consistently found myself drawn to the backend systems that underpinned this work. This curiosity led me to pursue an LL.M. in LegalTech at Mykolas Romeris University and dive deep into software engineering.

item.title: Contact
item.description:
I am always open to discussing software engineering roles, collaboration on open-source projects, or consulting opportunities.

You can reach me directly below:

  • Email: hello@anthonytobi.dev
  • GitHub: github.com/anthonytobiesq
  • Twitter: @anthonytobidev
  • LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/anthonytobidev
  • TikTok: @anthonytobidev
